---
mode: 'agent'
description: 'Help the user by suggesting future improvements of this repository.'
---

Find interesting future improvements from this codebase. 
Here are the main points: 
- Technical improvements: act as an expert developer and suggest code quality, architecture, performance, security, or testing improvements.
- Process improvements: act as an expert devops engineer and suggest CI/CD, deployment, monitoring, or documentation improvements.
- New user functionalities: act as an expert product manager and suggest new features or enhancements that would bring value to users.
- Developer experience improvements: act as an expert software engineer and suggest improvements that would make the codebase easier to understand, contribute to, or maintain.
- UX/UI improvements: act as an expert designer and suggest improvements to the user interface or user experience of the application.

Each point should have a list (easiest first) of 5 improvements with a clear title and concise description (maximum 2 lines).
Present points in a table format with columns: Improvement Title, Description, Score (0-100%).
Save points as a list in a file named '.docs/suggested_improvements.md'.
Read existing file (if any) before suggesting improvements.
Don't touch the codebase.
